example_openings: Thank you for your interest in [property]! We'd love to help you plan your perfect stay.
Great to hear from you! [Property] is a wonderful choice for your dates.
Just checking in — I noticed you were looking at [property] for [dates]. Still considering?
Hi [name], following up on your inquiry. Happy to answer any questions about [property] or the area.

final_attempt.tone: professional, respectful of their time, creates gentle urgency
example_openings: I know you're probably weighing options — just wanted to let you know [property] is getting quite popular for your dates.
Last note from me — if [property] isn't quite right, we have some other options that might be a better fit.

talking_points: Mention loyalty benefits for returning guests
Suggest similar properties in the same area
Add to waitlist if cancellation likely

location_questions.approach: Paint a picture of the experience

comparison_shopping.approach: Differentiate on service, not just price

tone_escalation.stage_1_inquiry: Warm, enthusiastic, helpful — match their energy
tone_escalation.stage_2_followup_3h: Friendly, informative — add value, don't just ask 'still interested?'
tone_escalation.stage_3_followup_12h: Personal, low-pressure — reference specifics from their inquiry
tone_escalation.stage_4_followup_24h: Professional, gentle urgency — mention popularity or limited availability
tone_escalation.stage_5_followup_1w: Respectful closing — offer alternatives, leave door open

friday_retreats: Curated collection of premium properties across Mauritius
Personal concierge service from booking to checkout
Local team on the ground for any issues
Direct communication — no waiting for platform message relay
Authentic Mauritius experiences — local tips and recommendations
mauritius: Rich cultural diversity (Creole, Indian, Chinese, French)
Direct flights from major European and Asian hubs
No visa required for most nationalities
